title: Moyai structures
description: Adds different Moyai structures to beaches
body:
This mod introduces 12 unique Moyai structures 🗿 to Minecraft's beaches, with a chance to also appear in mushroom field biomes. 

Occasionally, these Moyai structures may contain hidden loot within them, so it's always worth exploring them during your adventures.

![Moyai](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81da7176a62d0ba29da5a75136a40f9fc50d2f4b.jpeg)
🗿 feel free to put it in your modpack!
